receive.title: Receive
receive.warningBody: Only send assets on supported networks — unsupported transfers may be lost permanently.
receive.warningCounterfactual: Your address is the same on every supported network. Funds sent here are safe and yours — even before your wallet is deployed.
receive.warningReminder: Supported networks only — transfers on other networks may be lost.

request.amountHint: Leave blank to let the sender choose the amount
request.tokenSearchPlaceholder: Search or paste a token address
request.tokenNotFound: Couldn't find that token on this network
request.savedBody: The payment QR was saved to your photos.
request.permBody: Allow photo access to save the image.

pay.title: Payment request
pay.scanHintAddress: Any wallet can scan — pick the network, token & amount yourself
pay.manualNote: Or enter these details by hand:
pay.invalidBody: This link is missing a valid recipient or network. Ask the sender for a new one.
